zh.Kempsey, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾肯普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Bucke於1315年出生在英國武斯特斯爾肯普時，他的父親John Bucke25歲，母親Isabell Richardson25歲。他於1336年與Elizabeth Clyfton在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾肯普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1340年在英國維爾爾其朋納姆享年25歲。

zh-hans.Kempsey, Worcestershire, England: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾肯普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Bucke于1315年出生在英国武斯特斯爾肯普时，他的父亲John Bucke25岁，母亲Isabell Richardson25岁。他于1336年与Elizabeth Clyfton在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾肯普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1340年在英国維爾爾其朋納姆享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bucke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Buck
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English buc(ke) ‘male goat’ (Old English bucca) or a ‘male deer’ (Old English bucc). The goat was popularly associated with lecherous behaviour and the deer with timidity and speed. The surname may also be a shortened form of longer occupational names, for example Roger le Bucmanger' ‘dealer in bucks or venison’, (Warwickshire 1221) or Walter Bucswayn perhaps ‘goatherd’ (Somerset 1327).
English: topographic name for someone who lived near a prominent beech tree, such as Peter atte Buk (Suffolk 1327), from Middle English buk ‘beech’ (from Old English bōc).
German and Dutch (Limburg): from a personal name, a short form of Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Bucke was born in 1315, in Kempsey, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Bucke, was 25 and his mother, Isabell Richardson, was 25. He married Elizabeth Clyfton in 1336, in Kempsey, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1340, in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Bucke est né en 1315, à Kempsey, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Bucke, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabell Richardson, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Clyfton en 1336, à Kempsey, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1340, à Chippenham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Bucke 1315 in Kempsey, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Bucke 25 und seine Mutter Isabell Richardson 25. Er hat 1336 in Kempsey, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Clyfton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1340 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bucke è nato il nel 1315 nel Kempsey, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Bucke, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Richardson, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Clyfton nel 1336, nel Kempsey, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1340, nel Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.Chippenham, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハム
ja.Kempsey, Worcestershire, England: イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアケンプセイ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Buckeが1315年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアケンプセイで生まれた時，父John Buckeは25歳，母Isabell Richardsonは25歳であった。1336年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアケンプセイでElizabeth Clyftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1340年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハムで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bucke(이)가 1315년 영국 워스스터실르 케프시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bucke(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Richardson(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 케프시에서 Elizabeth Clyfton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1340년 영국 윌츠히르 치펜함에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bucke nasceu em 1315, em Kempsey, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bucke, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Richardson, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Clyfton em 1336, em Kempsey, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1340, em Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Bucke родился в 1315 г. в местности кемпси, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Bucke было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Richardson, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Clyfton в 1336 г. в местности кемпси, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1340 г. в местности чиппенам, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Bucke nació en 1315, en Kempsey, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bucke, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabell Richardson, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Clyfton en 1336, en Kempsey, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1340, en Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años.
